results.description: Declared workspaces in struct.toml [project].workspaces must exist on disk with Cargo.toml
Every directory at the project root with a Cargo.toml must be declared in struct.toml [project].workspaces

violations.message: Workspace 'controlroom' has Cargo.toml but not registered in struct.toml [project].workspaces
violations.fix_hint: Add 'controlroom' to struct.toml [project].workspaces or remove the directory if it's not a project peer
